prompt:
Editorial Instagram carousel slide, aspect ratio 4:5, premium scientific aesthetic. Solid deep forest-black background hex #0a1a0e. Centered vertical composition with Portuguese-Brazilian text rendered in DM Sans typeface, color #f8fffc.

HEADLINE (DM Sans Medium, very large ~78px equivalent, line-height 1.0, letter-spacing -0.02em, left-aligned mid-slide):
A ferritina "normal"
que está te custando
90 segundos
no seu 10k.

The word "normal" (with surrounding quotation marks) must be rendered in italic style, slightly desaturated teal #5BAE9E.

SMALL SUBCOPY at bottom-third of slide (DM Sans Regular ~42px, color #f8fffc at 80% opacity):
O número está no laudo. Ninguém te mostrou.

RESERVE empty space at bottom-center, 80px from bottom edge, approximately 280px wide x 60px tall — for logo overlay added in post (do NOT generate any logo or wordmark).

Mood: Mito Health editorial precision crossed with Equinox athletic restraint. Lots of negative space. No illustrations, no icons, no photographs. Pure typographic composition.

ABSOLUTELY NO: test tubes, blue lab tubes, iron supplement bottles, smiling runners in pink athletic wear, 3D heart or chrome DNA visuals, pure white background, red saturated blood drop icons, emojis, decorative flourishes, em-dashes overuse.
notes: Hook slide. Italics on 'normal'. Heavy negative space.

prompt:
Editorial Instagram carousel slide, aspect ratio 4:5, scientific data visualization aesthetic. Solid deep forest-black background hex #0a1a0e. Portuguese-Brazilian text in DM Sans typeface, primary text color #f8fffc.

TOP HEADLINE (DM Sans Medium ~78px, line-height 1.0, letter-spacing -0.02em, left-aligned, color #f8fffc):
Normal para o laboratório.
Insuficiente para você.

MIDDLE — vertical numeric stack, left-aligned, each row has a very large number in DM Sans Light ~140px (tight kerning) in color #7ab5a0 sage, followed by descriptor in DM Sans Regular ~42px in color #f8fffc at 85% opacity. Three rows stacked vertically with generous spacing:

15 ng/mL — limite inferior da faixa convencional
50 ng/mL — mínimo para sustentar endurance
80–100 ng/mL — território de performance

VISUAL HIGHLIGHT: a translucent horizontal band/rectangle behind/across the area covering values 15 to 50 (the first two rows), filled with teal #5BAE9E at 15% opacity, with a thin 1px teal border. To the right of this band, a short italic label in DM Sans Regular ~36px color #5BAE9E:
A zona da corredora exausta.

BOTTOM CAPTION (DM Sans Regular ~36px, color #f8fffc at 65% opacity, left-aligned):
A faixa do laboratório é genérica. Não foi escrita para quem corre 4x na semana.

RESERVE empty space at bottom-center, 80px from bottom edge, ~280x60px for logo overlay (do NOT generate logo).

Mood: precise, editorial, scientific Mito Health vibe. Pure typography + one subtle translucent band. No charts, no graphs, no icons, no photographs.

ABSOLUTELY NO: test tubes, blue lab tubes, supplement bottles, runners, 3D anatomy, chrome DNA, pure white background, red blood drop icons, emojis, bar charts, pie charts.
notes: Data slide — numeric stack with highlight band 15-50.

prompt:
Editorial Instagram carousel slide, aspect ratio 4:5, premium typographic composition. Solid deep forest-black background hex #0a1a0e. Portuguese-Brazilian text in DM Sans, primary color #f8fffc.

HEADLINE (DM Sans Medium ~78px, line-height 1.0, letter-spacing -0.02em, left-aligned, top of slide, color #f8fffc):
Por que o seu corpo
drena ferro mais rápido
do que repõe.

BODY PROSE (DM Sans Regular ~42px, line-height 1.3, color #f8fffc at 90% opacity, left-aligned, multiple paragraphs with breathing room between them):

Ferritina é o estoque. Hemoglobina é o transporte.

A cada passada, microhemólise. Cada treino longo, perda pelo suor. Cada ciclo, mais saída.

Quando o estoque cai, a hemoglobina ainda parece adequada — mas a entrega de oxigênio ao músculo desacelera antes do hemograma acusar.

Fadiga subclínica. Cadência que escorrega. Longo que pesa do quilômetro 7.

The word "adequada" rendered in italic style.

CLOSING LINE at bottom, in DM Sans Regular Italic ~42px, color #5BAE9E (teal accent), left-aligned:
A anemia chega depois. A queda de performance, primeiro.

RESERVE empty space at bottom-center, 80px from bottom edge, ~280x60px for logo overlay (do NOT generate logo).

Mood: editorial Aesop-meets-Mito-Health. Pure typography. Heavy use of negative space. No images, no icons.

ABSOLUTELY NO: test tubes, supplement bottles, runners in pink, 3D hearts, chrome DNA, pure white background, red blood icons, emojis, decorative ornaments.
notes: Mechanism slide — prose-heavy, italic closing in teal.

prompt:
Editorial Instagram carousel slide, aspect ratio 4:5, structured plan layout. Solid deep forest-black background hex #0a1a0e. Portuguese-Brazilian text in DM Sans, primary color #f8fffc.

HEADLINE at top (DM Sans Medium ~78px, line-height 1.0, letter-spacing -0.02em, left-aligned, color #f8fffc):
O que pedir.
O que cruzar.
O que esperar.

BODY — four stacked blocks, each with a bold-weight short title and a regular-weight one-sentence explanation. Generous vertical spacing between blocks. Left-aligned.

Block title style: DM Sans Medium ~48px, color #5BAE9E teal.
Block body style: DM Sans Regular ~38px, line-height 1.3, color #f8fffc at 85% opacity.

Block 1:
Peça ferritina específica.
Não aceite "hemograma normal" como resposta.

Block 2:
Cruze com transferrina e saturação.
Estoque sozinho não conta a história inteira.

Block 3:
Suplementação é contexto, não receita.
Forma, dose e janela dependem do seu painel. Ferro mal-prescrito não absorve — ou inflama.

Block 4:
Reavalie em 8 a 12 semanas.
Ferritina sobe devagar. Performance volta na sequência.

RESERVE empty space at bottom-center, 80px from bottom edge, ~280x60px for logo overlay (do NOT generate logo).

Mood: clinical, editorial, restrained. Pure typography. No icons, no checkmarks, no numbered circles, no photographs.

ABSOLUTELY NO: test tubes, supplement bottles, runners, 3D anatomy, chrome DNA, pure white background, red blood icons, emojis, checkbox icons, numbered bullets in circles.
notes: Plan slide — four titled blocks with teal headers.

prompt:
Editorial Instagram carousel CTA slide, aspect ratio 4:5, closing composition with heavy negative space. Solid deep forest-black background hex #0a1a0e. Portuguese-Brazilian text in DM Sans, primary color #f8fffc.

MAIN HEADLINE centered vertically slightly above middle (DM Sans Light/Medium ~78px, line-height 1.0, letter-spacing -0.02em, left-aligned, color #f8fffc):
Sua ferritina exata
é um número público
no seu corpo.

DIRECTLY BELOW headline, with small vertical gap, ITALIC subhead in DM Sans Regular Italic ~48px, color #5BAE9E teal, left-aligned:
Você pode pedir.

FOOTER LINE near bottom (but above logo zone), DM Sans Regular ~32px, color #f8fffc at 60% opacity, left-aligned or centered:
Longevify — 100+ biomarcadores + AI on-demand. Para quem treina sério.

RESERVE empty horizontal space at bottom-center, 80px from bottom edge, approximately 320px wide x 70px tall — for logo overlay added in post-processing (do NOT generate any logo, wordmark, or text in that zone — leave it empty background).

Mood: Aesop-quiet, editorial closing. Pure typography. Lots of breathing room. No icons, no photographs, no decorative elements.

ABSOLUTELY NO: test tubes, blue lab tubes, supplement bottles, runners in pink, 3D hearts, chrome DNA, pure white background, red blood drop icons, emojis, arrow icons, swipe-up graphics.
notes: CTA slide. Italic subhead in teal. Logo zone reserved at bottom-center.
